name: irina-grigoreva/guestbook
description: Dockerized PHP guestbook application for a backend portfolio project.

scripts.cs: phpcs -p --standard=PSR12 --extensions=php src/controllers src/Factory src/models src/Repository src/Service src/Validator tests
scripts.cs:fix: phpcbf -p --standard=PSR12 --extensions=php src/controllers src/Factory src/models src/Repository src/Service src/Validator tests
